documentation_impact.rationale: Task-local diff introduces new operator-facing documentation and run artifacts for the nested proof-bundle feature; policy requires recording those surfaces in the same delivery set.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Work remains local-only, respects human ratification gates, and stages the governed ship-stage artifact under the canonical /src/work/<day>/<task-id>/ path.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: The artifact captures documentation-impact decisions and preserves lifecycle traceability for newly introduced feature and workflow records.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: The task output stays within MVP governance goals by delivering citation-backed memory artifacts and preserving human control over ship-stage advancement.
